content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 8, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development focused on stabilizing the Eliza Cloud Apps data plane and ingress routing. Significant progress was made on P0 blockers, including per-app Caddy routing, collision-safe port allocation, and tenant database isolation. Infrastructure and CI/CD pipelines were also refined to support isolated staging environments and resolve runtime dependency issues for agent images.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Apps Ingress and Routing**
*   Implemented a per-app Caddy routing client to enable `<shortid>.apps.elizacloud.ai` reverse-proxying, managed via Caddy's admin API ([#8325](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8325)).
*   Added collision-safe host-port allocation to prevent `docker create` conflicts during high-density deployments ([#8328](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8328)).
*   Ensured tenant DSN injection for both `DATABASE_URL` and `POSTGRES_URL` to maintain strict isolation contracts ([#8322](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8322)).

**Infrastructure and CI/CD Stability**
*   Resolved Terraform application errors in the Hetzner apps data-plane ([#8318](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8318)).
*   Fixed runtime image dependency issues by hoisting `plugin-wallet` and its transitive dependencies ([#8331](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8331), [#8333](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8333)).
*   Isolated Worker staging environments to use dedicated BitRouter staging endpoints ([#8327](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8327), [#8329](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8329), [#8330](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8330)).

**BitRouter and AI Pricing**
*   Switched BitRouter to API-key mode (BYOK) to resolve HTTP 402 payment errors ([#8323](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8323), [#8324](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8324)).
*   Cleaned up BitRouter YAML configurations and forced pricing for OpenAI text-embedding models to prevent 5xx errors ([#8326](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8326), [#8332](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8332)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   **Infrastructure & Database:** [#8344](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8344) (optional tenant-DB node), [#8338](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8338) (opt-in per-tenant DB), [#8337](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8337) (retire cpx41), [#8343](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8343) (tenant-DB teardown).
*   **Features & UX:** [#8341](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8341) (canvas voice preference), [#8339](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8339) (interactive canvas Voice UX), [#8336](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8336) (plugin-sql sync), [#8335](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8335) (verified custom domains).
*   **Fixes:** [#8340](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8340) (route dynamic view commands), [#8334](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8334) (repair route-coverage tool).

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   *No issues were closed during this period.*

## NEW ISSUES
*   **Billing & Audit:** [#8342](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8342) identifies four billing leaks in the Apps (Product 2) hosting and per-tenant-DB model that require resolution before go-live.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   **[#8321](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8321) Eliza Cloud Apps Scaling & Ingress:** Development is nearing completion on the cloud-shared/app-code side. Key P0 items (isolation contract, ingress routing, and port allocation) are marked as complete. Remaining tasks focus on infrastructure-level cloud-init configurations, specifically Caddy installation, pgbouncer connection pooling, and provisioning-lifecycle management. The team recommends delaying the production deployment of apps until these infrastructure-level blockers are resolved.
